message:
Add comprehensive local fallback tests for hook (od4)

- test_fallback_no_workers_configured: daemon reports no workers
- test_fallback_all_workers_unreachable: all workers failed health check
- test_fallback_all_workers_busy: all workers at capacity
- test_fallback_all_circuits_open: circuit breaker tripped
- test_fallback_selection_error: daemon internal error
- test_fallback_daemon_error_response: HTTP 500 error
- test_fallback_daemon_malformed_json: invalid JSON response
- test_fallback_daemon_connection_reset: connection dropped

All tests verify fail-open behavior: hook returns Allow for local execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
